TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Don Ameche == kawas tay 1908, ryax sa tay 31 nqu tay 5, Don Ameche, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 1993) qnxan nya Don Ameche ga, la'iy ni Felice Amici. Don Ameche maki tay kawas 1932 msqun ki Honore Prendergast. Don Ameche, minkahul sa Kenosha, Wisconsin. hiya yaba(Felice Amici) quo sinsiy pimcyogan nya maki Ascoli,Piceno,Marche. Barbara,Etta,Hertel yaya lalu nya,maki Scottish Irish ru German ramu. Ameche te sazing laqi, maki cyugal mlikuy Umberto ,James ru Louis ru maki payat kneril laqi Elizabeth Catherine,Mary ru Anna. Ameche mqwas beh Marquette krahu' pqwasan biru,Loras ru Wisconsin- Madison .1954 kawas magal Heisman Trophy sqabu . qnxan na sraral Don Ameche 1908 kawas 5 byacing 31 ryax htgan beh Wisconsin, Kenosha,Italy . mintzyuwaw nya Don Ameche hiya ga m' Engi. Don Ameche sa kawas 1935, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na Engi ru mqwas. mhuqil 1993 kawas 12 byacing 6 ryax,cyux nbu maki ngasal mhuqil la(85 kawas). mincyogan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: == *on ameʦ~ʨħe == kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *on ameʦ~ʨħe, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. (wal mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) qnxan nja *on ameʦ~ʨħe ɣa, laʔij ni *eliʦ~ʨe amiʦ~ʨi. *on ameʦ~ʨħe maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki ħonore pren*erɣas~ɕt. *on ameʦ~ʨħe, minkaħul s~ɕa kenos~ɕħa, wis~ɕʦ~ʨons~ɕin. ħija jaβa(*eliʦ~ʨe amiʦ~ʨi) quo s~ɕins~ɕij pimʦ~ʨjoɣan nja maki as~ɕʦ~ʨoli,piʦ~ʨeno,marʦ~ʨħe. βarβara,etta,ħertel jaja lalu nja,maki s~ɕʦ~ʨottis~ɕħ iris~ɕħ ru ɣerman ramu. ameʦ~ʨħe te s~ɕaziŋ laqi, maki ʦ~ʨjuɣal mlikuj umβerto ,*ames~ɕ ru louis~ɕ ru maki pajat kneril laqi elizaβetħ ʦ~ʨatħerine,marj ru anna. ameʦ~ʨħe mqwas~ɕ βeħ marquette kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru,loras~ɕ ru wis~ɕʦ~ʨons~ɕin- ma*is~ɕon .**** kawas~ɕ maɣal ħeis~ɕman tropħj s~ɕqaβu . qnxan na s~ɕraral *on ameʦ~ʨħe **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax ħtɣan βeħ wis~ɕʦ~ʨons~ɕin, kenos~ɕħa,italj . mintzjuwaw nja *on ameʦ~ʨħe ħija ɣa mʔ eŋi. *on ameʦ~ʨħe s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na eŋi ru mqwas~ɕ. mħuqil **** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ * rjax,ʦ~ʨjux nβu maki ŋas~ɕal mħuqil la(** kawas~ɕ). minʦ~ʨjoɣan nja ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
S.FORM: == Don Ameche == kawas tay 1908, ryax sa tay 31 nqu tay 5, Don Ameche, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 1993) qnxan nya Don Ameche ga, la'iy ni Felice Amici. Don Ameche maki tay kawas 1932 msqun ki Honore Prendergast. Don Ameche, minkahul sa Kenosha, Wisconsin. hiya yaba(Felice Amici) quo sinsiy pimcyogan nya maki Ascoli,Piceno,Marche. Barbara,Etta,Hertel yaya lalu nya,maki Scottish Irish ru German ramu. Ameche te sazing laqi, maki cyugal mlikuy Umberto ,James ru Louis ru maki payat kneril laqi Elizabeth Catherine,Mary ru Anna. Ameche mqwas beh Marquette krahu' pqwasan biru,Loras ru Wisconsin- Madison .1954 kawas magal Heisman Trophy sqabu . qnxan na sraral Don Ameche 1908 kawas 5 byacing 31 ryax htgan beh Wisconsin, Kenosha,Italy . mintzyuwaw nya Don Ameche hiya ga m' Engi. Don Ameche sa kawas 1935, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na Engi ru mqwas. mhuqil 1993 kawas 12 byacing 6 ryax,cyux nbu maki ngasal mhuqil la(85 kawas). mincyogan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: == *on ameʦ~ʨħe == kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *on ameʦ~ʨħe, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. (wal mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) qnxan nja *on ameʦ~ʨħe ɣa, laʔij ni *eliʦ~ʨe amiʦ~ʨi. *on ameʦ~ʨħe maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki ħonore pren*erɣas~ɕt. *on ameʦ~ʨħe, minkaħul s~ɕa kenos~ɕħa, wis~ɕʦ~ʨons~ɕin. ħija jaβa(*eliʦ~ʨe amiʦ~ʨi) quo s~ɕins~ɕij pimʦ~ʨjoɣan nja maki as~ɕʦ~ʨoli,piʦ~ʨeno,marʦ~ʨħe. βarβara,etta,ħertel jaja lalu nja,maki s~ɕʦ~ʨottis~ɕħ iris~ɕħ ru ɣerman ramu. ameʦ~ʨħe te s~ɕaziŋ laqi, maki ʦ~ʨjuɣal mlikuj umβerto ,*ames~ɕ ru louis~ɕ ru maki pajat kneril laqi elizaβetħ ʦ~ʨatħerine,marj ru anna. ameʦ~ʨħe mqwas~ɕ βeħ marquette kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru,loras~ɕ ru wis~ɕʦ~ʨons~ɕin- ma*is~ɕon .**** kawas~ɕ maɣal ħeis~ɕman tropħj s~ɕqaβu . qnxan na s~ɕraral *on ameʦ~ʨħe **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax ħtɣan βeħ wis~ɕʦ~ʨons~ɕin, kenos~ɕħa,italj . mintzjuwaw nja *on ameʦ~ʨħe ħija ɣa mʔ eŋi. *on ameʦ~ʨħe s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na eŋi ru mqwas~ɕ. mħuqil **** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ * rjax,ʦ~ʨjux nβu maki ŋas~ɕal mħuqil la(** kawas~ɕ). minʦ~ʨjoɣan nja ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
